info.title: RankLib.Cli
info.description: Learning to Rank (LTR) command line interface (CLI) tool for .NET, with implementations of popular ranking algorithms

commands.name: eval
commands.description: Trains and evaluates a ranker, or evaluates a previously saved ranker model.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyzes the performance of saved models by comparing them against a baseline.

commands.name: combine
commands.description: Combines ensembles from files in a directory into one file

arguments.name: directory
arguments.description: The directory of files to combine

commands.name: prepare
commands.description: Split the input sample set into k chunks (folds) of roughly equal size and create train/ test data for each fold

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Feature statistics for the given model

arguments.name: model
arguments.description: The path to the model file
